Meet the Doctor
Dr. Iftekhar Khan
MBBS, MD Dermatology
🏛️ AIIMS Delhi

Dr. Iftekhar Khan is an experienced dermatologist specializing in skin, hair, laser, and aesthetic treatments. He focuses on accurate diagnosis and personalized care to deliver safe, natural, and long-lasting results.

At Truederm, treatments are designed based on the root cause — not temporary fixes. From acne and pigmentation to hair transplant, Botox, and anti-ageing, each treatment is carefully customized for the individual.

🔬
Root-Cause DiagnosisTreats the problem, not just the symptom
💊
Personalized TreatmentCustom plans for every patient
🌿
Safe & Natural ResultsLong-term skin health as the primary goal
Our Specialty

Hair Transplant
by Dr. Iftekhar Khan

Hair loss affects confidence. At Truederm, we offer advanced hair transplant procedures using the latest techniques — FUE (Follicular Unit Extraction) and FUT — to give you a permanent, natural-looking hairline.

Dr. Iftekhar Khan, trained at AIIMS Delhi, personally performs every procedure with utmost precision and care.

🔬
FUE Technique
Minimally invasive, no linear scar, faster recovery
⚡
FUT Technique
Maximum graft yield, ideal for advanced hair loss
💧
PRP Therapy
Platelet-rich plasma to boost hair growth naturally
🌿
Natural Results
Permanent, natural-looking hairline restoration
